ARHunt This is one of the projects I built purely for fun, and one I am still proud of.
We ran it as an augmented-reality treasure hunt…

frontmatter.title: ARHunt
frontmatter.description: An augmented-reality treasure hunt we built for our college tech fest, where scanning a character reveals a 3D model that hints at your next stop.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Scan a character, get a clue, chase the treasure
